name: ggbook-club-simulator
description: Living e-sports club simulator + API test bench for Gizmo V3: virtual players with personas (sessions, bar orders, deposits, reservations, assets, app launches), a pixel-art live club map, and full Gizmo V3 API testing — GET catalog scan, safe create-update-delete mutation cycles, request inspector, cross-version report and OpenAPI doc diffs

scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npx vite build
